To do so, please click on the Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information/Opt-Out of Targeted Advertising tab to the left. Keep in mind that: 1\. You will still receive cookies that are essential to the function of the website; 2\. You will still see advertising, but it will not be targeted and may not be relevant to you; and 3\. We will still share your personal data with our service providers and travel suppliers to provide the services on our web site. In order to have your opt-out associated with your account, you must be logged in.
